upstream.closed_signal: Jeffrey Emanuel reported the close-path persistence repro verified fixed in br 0.2.6 on 2026-05-14T06:02:54Z.

smoke_test.command: tmp=$(mktemp -d /tmp/br285-smoke.XXXXXX); cd "$tmp"; br init; id=$(br create --title "br285 close persistence smoke" --type bug --priority 2 --json | jq -r '.id'); before=$(sqlite3 .beads/beads.db "SELECT status FROM issues WHERE id='$id'"); br close "$id" --reason "br285 local absorption smoke"; after=$(sqlite3 .beads/beads.db "SELECT status FROM issues WHERE id='$id'"); jsonl=$(tail -1 .beads/issues.jsonl | jq -r '.status'); test "$before" = open && test "$after" = closed && test "$jsonl" = closed

additional_validation.result: head 201439c7 CLEAN; Public Surface, Install Doctor Uninstall ubuntu, Install Doctor Uninstall macOS, and GitGuardian all SUCCESS

not_claimed: This does not claim every historical Flywheel bead row has been reconciled.
This does not patch Jeffrey-owned beads_rust source locally.
This closes only the local upstream tracker because the upstream issue is closed and the fixed binary is absorbed.
